The custom 420mm AIO liquid cooler maintains the i9-14900K well within thermal limits even at full sustained load with all cores boosting simultaneously. The 1200W 80+ Titanium PSU is among the most electrically efficient consumer power supplies available, wasting less energy as heat and providing a quieter operation under load. The Lian Li O11 Dynamic EVO XL case provides exceptional cable management, airflow, and visual impact for a build of this caliber.

fields.name: Custom Workstation AMD Ryzen 9 7950X3D RX 7900 XTX

characteristics.CPU: AMD Ryzen 9 7950X3D (16 Cores, 32 Threads, up to 5.7GHz, 3D V-Cache)
characteristics.Storage: 2TB WD Black SN850X NVMe PCIe 4.0 SSD
characteristics.Case: Fractal Design Torrent XL Full Tower

fields.description: This custom all-AMD workstation combines the extraordinary 3D V-Cache technology of the Ryzen 9 7950X3D with the raw 24GB VRAM capacity of the Radeon RX 7900 XTX, creating a machine that excels across the full spectrum of gaming, creative, and professional compute workloads within a unified, driver-compatible AMD ecosystem. The Ryzen 9 7950X3D's 3D Vertical Cache stacking technology dramatically expands the on-die L3 cache from the standard 64MB to 128MB, reducing memory latency in cache-sensitive gaming workloads by a margin that translates into meaningfully higher gaming framerates compared to equivalently clocked processors without 3D V-Cache. Sixteen Zen 4 cores at up to 5.7GHz simultaneously handle gaming, background streaming, render jobs, and developer toolchains with the kind of graceful throughput that makes the entire system feel consistently responsive regardless of how many simultaneous workloads are running. The AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX with 24GB of GDDR6 VRAM is a professional-grade VRAM allocation that makes this machine ideal for large-scale 3D scene rendering, AI image generation with large models, and 4K gaming without memory constraints in even the most VRAM-demanding titles. The Noctua NH-D15 chromax.black provides legendary, near-silent air cooling performance that rivals 280mm AIOs in sustained thermal management with superior long-term reliability. The Fractal Design Torrent XL case features enormous front intake fans that move extraordinary volumes of air through the case at very low RPMs, keeping noise output minimal. This is a comprehensive, cohesive AMD build for professionals who prefer open-platform flexibility.

fields.name: Custom Workstation Intel i5-13600K RTX 4070 Ti

characteristics.CPU: Intel Core i5-13600K (14 Cores, 20 Threads, up to 5.1GHz)
characteristics.Cooling: be quiet! Dark Rock Elite Air Cooler
characteristics.Case: Phanteks Eclipse G500A Mid Tower

fields.description: This custom build centers on the extraordinary value proposition of the Intel Core i5-13600K вЂ” a 14-core processor that consistently outperforms previous-generation i9 chips in both single and multi-threaded workloads at a fraction of the price, making it the most sensible gaming CPU choice in the entire 2023-2024 Intel lineup for builds targeting 1440p and 4K performance. Paired with the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Ti 12GB GDDR6X, this configuration delivers genuine high-performance 4K gaming and exceptional 1440p performance at ultra settings, with DLSS 3 Frame Generation providing additional headroom in supported titles for framerates that feel consistently smooth even in graphically intensive scenes. The MSI MAG Z790 TOMAHAWK WiFi provides solid overclocking support for the i5-13600K, excellent connectivity, and reliable long-term operation backed by MSI's quality components. Corsair Vengeance DDR5-6000 at 2x16GB hits the ideal balance of speed and density for the Z790 platform, running at XMP frequencies that extract the available memory bandwidth performance from the i5-13600K's memory controller. The be quiet! Dark Rock Elite air cooler handles the i5-13600K's thermal output without the noise penalty of lesser air coolers, maintaining comfortable temperatures while operating at near-silent noise levels. The Phanteks Eclipse G500A case features a mesh front panel that maximizes airflow through the case with minimal restriction, keeping all components cool and prolonging hardware longevity. This is an expert-assembled configuration that eliminates wasteful spending on components that don't translate to real-world gaming benefits.

fields.name: Custom Workstation AMD Ryzen 5 7600X RTX 4070 Super

characteristics.CPU: AMD Ryzen 5 7600X (6 Cores, 12 Threads, up to 5.3GHz)
characteristics.Storage: 1TB WD Black SN850X NVMe PCIe 4.0 SSD
characteristics.Cooling: Deepcool AK620 Dual Tower Air Cooler
characteristics.Case: Corsair 4000D Airflow Mid Tower

fields.description: This custom build represents the most intelligent balance of performance and budget in our workstation lineup, built around the Ryzen 5 7600X вЂ” a six-core Zen 4 processor that consistently proves its critics wrong by providing exceptional single-threaded gaming performance thanks to its 5.3GHz boost clock that beats every previous-generation Ryzen chip in clock-sensitive gaming workloads. The RTX 4070 Super 12GB GDDR6X is an outstanding GPU partner for the 7600X, delivering the computational throughput for 1440p gaming at maximum settings and 4K gaming with DLSS 3 enabled, while the processor ensures that CPU-side workloads never become the bottleneck in gaming frame generation pipelines. The ASUS TUF Gaming B650-PLUS WiFi provides a reliable, feature-complete AM5 platform foundation with PCIe 5.0 support, comprehensive M.2 slots, and integrated WiFi 6E вЂ” everything the 7600X needs to operate at peak efficiency. Kingston Fury Beast DDR5-5600 hits the sweet spot of price and performance for the AM5 memory controller, providing strong gaming bandwidth without paying premium pricing for extreme-frequency kits that deliver diminishing returns in gaming workloads. The Deepcool AK620 dual-tower air cooler is one of the most capable air cooling solutions available вЂ” matching many 360mm AIOs in sustained thermal performance at a fraction of the cost and with superior long-term reliability. The Corsair 4000D Airflow case is widely regarded as one of the best mid-tower cases for airflow and cable management in its price class. This is expert-curated value.

fields.name: Custom Workstation AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D RTX 4080 Super

characteristics.CPU: AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D (8 Cores, 16 Threads, up to 5.0GHz, 3D V-Cache)
characteristics.Motherboard: ASUS ROG Strix X670E-F Gaming WiFi
characteristics.Case: Lian Li O11 Dynamic EVO Mid Tower

fields.description: This custom build around the AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D represents the ultimate expression of gaming-optimized CPU architecture available today. The 7800X3D's 3D V-Cache technology stacks 64MB of additional L3 cache directly on top of the standard cache complex, bringing the total L3 to 96MB вЂ” a cache size so large that most game assets fit entirely within it, eliminating DRAM latency for the overwhelming majority of gaming workload data accesses and producing gaming performance that consistently outperforms every other processor available, including those with significantly higher core counts and boost frequencies. Eight Zen 4 cores at 5.0GHz complement the cache advantage with strong IPC performance, making the 7800X3D the gaming CPU of choice for enthusiasts building a system specifically optimized for maximum gaming framerates. The RTX 4080 Super 16GB GDDR6X is the most powerful GPU in NVIDIA's standard Ada Lovelace lineup, delivering 4K gaming performance that matches or exceeds many benchmark results for the RTX 4090 in rasterization-heavy workloads, making it an extraordinary value at its price point. G.Skill Trident Z5 Neo DDR5-6000 CL30 modules are the specifically optimized memory configuration for Ryzen 7000 series processors with AMD EXPO profiles, ensuring the memory controller operates in its ideal frequency and timings for this CPU. The ARCTIC Liquid Freezer III 360 keeps the 7800X3D at temperatures that sustain consistent 3D V-Cache operation. This is the gaming desktop for the buyer who has studied the benchmarks and wants the absolute fastest gaming-specific build.

fields.name: TP-Link Archer AX73 WiFi 6 Router
fields.description: The TP-Link Archer AX73 is a WiFi 6 router engineered for households and home offices where multiple devices compete simultaneously for bandwidth вЂ” streaming 4K video, gaming online, working from home on video calls, and browsing all at once without any one use case degrading the others. The AX5400 designation reflects a combined theoretical throughput of 5,400 Mbps across both bands, with the 5GHz band delivering up to 4,804 Mbps for high-demand devices within range, and the 2.4GHz band providing 574 Mbps for wider coverage at lower throughput for IoT devices and distant clients. OFDMA technology вЂ” one of WiFi 6's defining advancements вЂ” allows the router to simultaneously communicate with multiple devices within each transmission rather than sequentially polling clients, reducing latency and increasing effective throughput under dense device loads by up to four times compared to WiFi 5 implementations. The six high-gain external antennas are independently positioned and steerable to maximize coverage directionality, providing reliable signal across 2,500 square feet of living space. TP-Link HomeShield provides a subscription-based network security layer with real-time traffic analysis, parental controls, and intrusion detection, all managed through the Tether mobile application. USB 3.0 allows a shared storage device or USB printer to be connected to the network for household sharing. The AX73 is the value-maximizing WiFi 6 router for demanding multi-device households.

fields.name: TP-Link Archer AX90 Tri-Band WiFi 6 Router
fields.description: The TP-Link Archer AX90 is the tri-band flagship of the Archer WiFi 6 lineup, a router designed for homes and small offices where device density, bandwidth demands, and coverage area exceed what dual-band routers can comfortably handle. The AX6600 tri-band configuration provides two independent 5GHz bands вЂ” each capable of 4,804 Mbps вЂ” that can be dedicated to different device categories, with one 5GHz band typically reserved for backhaul in mesh extension scenarios and the other serving high-demand clients like gaming consoles, streaming devices, and laptops. The 2.5G WAN port accommodates multi-gigabit internet service from ISPs offering fiber plans above 1 Gbps, ensuring the router's internal bandwidth doesn't become a bottleneck for customers on premium internet tiers. An additional 2.5G LAN port is available for a wired gaming PC or NAS device that needs higher-than-Gigabit wired throughput. TP-Link's AI Roaming technology analyzes client signal strength, band utilization, and connection history to intelligently steer devices to the optimal band for their current location and usage pattern вЂ” a meaningful practical improvement over manual band selection in complex home environments. HomeCare Pro includes comprehensive antivirus, intrusion prevention, and content filtering backed by Trend Micro's threat intelligence database. Eight external antennas provide excellent coverage directionality across up to 3,000 square feet. The AX90 is the router for demanding homes and small offices that need professional-grade networking without professional-grade complexity.

fields.name: TP-Link Archer BE800 WiFi 7 Router

characteristics.MLO: Multi-Link Operation вЂ” simultaneous multi-band connection

fields.description: The TP-Link Archer BE800 is one of the first consumer WiFi 7 routers available, introducing the 802.11be standard that defines the next era of wireless networking with capabilities that dramatically exceed anything WiFi 6E could offer. WiFi 7's headline feature вЂ” Multi-Link Operation (MLO) вЂ” allows compatible client devices to simultaneously connect to multiple frequency bands at once, combining the bandwidth of 5GHz and 6GHz into a single logical connection and dramatically reducing latency through redundant path diversity, an advancement with profound implications for online gaming, low-latency video calls, and real-time applications. The 6GHz band introduced by WiFi 6E reaches its full potential under WiFi 7, providing up to 11,530 Mbps of theoretical throughput in a relatively uncongested spectrum range that most neighboring routers still cannot access, resulting in interference-free, clean channels for nearby high-demand devices. The 10G WAN ports accommodate symmetrical multi-gigabit internet services and enable ultra-fast LAN-to-LAN data transfers between connected devices. Coverage across up to 10,000 square feet makes this router an option for large homes, small businesses, and environments where a single access point has previously been insufficient. TP-Link HomeShield Pro provides enterprise-grade security features including intrusion detection, malware filtering, and parental controls. The BE800 is the forward-looking router for buyers who want their networking infrastructure to remain relevant through the entire lifecycle of WiFi 7 client device adoption.

fields.name: ASUS ZenWiFi Pro XT12 Tri-Band Mesh

characteristics.Backhaul: Dedicated 5GHz-2 wireless backhaul + wired Ethernet backhaul support

fields.description: The ASUS ZenWiFi Pro XT12 is a premium whole-home mesh WiFi 6 system designed for power users and home professionals who need reliable, high-throughput wireless coverage across larger living spaces or multi-floor homes without the dead zones and handoff delays that traditional single-router setups suffer from. Each XT12 node is a full-featured AX11000 tri-band router in its own right, and when deployed as a two-node system, the pair covers up to 5,500 square feet with consistent, fast connectivity throughout вЂ” coverage that single routers rarely achieve with real-world reliability. The dedicated third band вЂ” a second 5GHz radio вЂ” is reserved exclusively for node-to-node backhaul communication, ensuring that the wireless connection between nodes doesn't consume bandwidth from the client-facing 5GHz band, a critical design decision that many less expensive mesh systems neglect and which dramatically degrades their performance under real-world conditions. Wired Ethernet backhaul is also supported via the 2.5G ports on each node for installations where running a cable between floors or rooms is feasible вЂ” this provides rock-solid, maximum-bandwidth backhaul that no wireless solution can match. ASUS AiProtection Pro, powered by Trend Micro's threat intelligence, provides real-time network scanning, malicious site blocking, and device protection for all connected clients. The clean, minimalist white cylindrical design fits into modern living spaces without the aggressive aesthetic of traditional gaming routers. ASUS Router App provides intuitive management from any mobile device. The ZenWiFi Pro XT12 is mesh networking done right.

fields.name: ASUS ROG Rapture GT-AX11000 Pro

characteristics.Security: WPA3, AiProtection Pro, ROG Game Boost
characteristics.Gaming: Adaptive QoS, port prioritization, VPN Fusion

fields.description: The ASUS ROG Rapture GT-AX11000 Pro is the uncompromising router for serious gaming enthusiasts вЂ” a machine that approaches network configuration with the same philosophy that ROG applies to gaming laptops and motherboards: no shortcuts, no artificial limitations, maximum performance at every tier. The AX11000 tri-band configuration provides an extraordinary theoretical bandwidth of 11,000 Mbps across its three radios, with the tri-band design allowing dedicated backhaul for AI Mesh configurations while simultaneously serving both high-demand and legacy client devices on separate channels. The 10G WAN port accommodates multi-gigabit fiber connections that are becoming increasingly common in urban markets, ensuring the router's throughput doesn't constrain users on premium internet service tiers. The additional 10G LAN port enables an ultra-high-speed wired connection to a gaming PC or NAS without requiring a separate switch upgrade. ROG Game Boost automatically prioritizes gaming traffic above all other network activity with a single button press, reducing online game latency by ensuring gaming packets are always processed ahead of streaming and background traffic. Adaptive QoS provides granular bandwidth allocation per device or application, giving users precise control over how available bandwidth is divided among competing uses. VPN Fusion runs a VPN connection in parallel with the standard internet connection, enabling specific devices or applications to route through the VPN while others maintain direct connection вЂ” a valuable feature for privacy-conscious gamers and professionals. The GT-AX11000 Pro is the router that gives gaming its own lane on your network.

fields.name: ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 WiFi 6E Mesh

characteristics.Speed: AX11000 with 6GHz band (up to 4804 Mbps on 6GHz alone)
characteristics.Backhaul: Dedicated 6GHz backhaul or wired Ethernet backhaul

fields.description: The ASUS ZenWiFi Pro ET12 is a WiFi 6E mesh system that leverages the 6GHz spectrum вЂ” the new band unlocked by WiFi 6E вЂ” as a dedicated, interference-free backhaul highway between nodes, solving one of the fundamental performance limitations of earlier mesh systems in a way that delivers dramatically better real-world results for users in multi-floor homes or large living spaces. Standard mesh systems using 5GHz backhaul inevitably share backhaul bandwidth with client devices on the same channel, creating a performance ceiling that grows more painful as the number of connected clients increases. The ET12's 6GHz band backhaul sidesteps this problem entirely вЂ” the 6GHz spectrum is currently uncrowded in most residential areas and supports channels up to 160MHz wide, providing up to 4,804 Mbps of dedicated node-to-node bandwidth that doesn't compete with client traffic at all. The 3-node system covers up to 8,100 square feet with consistent WiFi 6E connectivity throughout, providing gigabit-class wireless speeds even in the most distant corners of a large home. Each node's 2.5G LAN ports accommodate high-speed wired device connections and allow Ethernet backhaul for installers who prefer wired node interconnects. AiProtection Pro security keeps all connected devices protected from network-based threats, malware, and unwanted content. The minimalist white cylindrical node design integrates cleanly into any interior style without the aggressive aesthetics of gaming-focused routers. Setup through the ASUS Router App requires no technical expertise beyond plugging in and following on-screen instructions.

fields.name: TP-Link Deco XE75 WiFi 6E Mesh System
fields.description: The TP-Link Deco XE75 brings WiFi 6E mesh networking to an accessible price point without compromising the core benefits of 6GHz spectrum access that distinguish WiFi 6E from its predecessor. For the large household or small office that has struggled with WiFi dead zones, inconsistent connectivity during device handoff between access points, or the performance degradation that comes from mesh systems sharing backhaul and client bands вЂ” the XE75 addresses all of these problems in a genuinely user-friendly package. The 6GHz band serves as a dedicated backhaul channel between nodes in the three-pack system, ensuring that the WiFi 6E speeds available to clients on the 5GHz and 6GHz bands are not diluted by backhaul overhead. Coverage extends to 6,900 square feet across the three nodes, a footprint that accommodates most large single-family homes, multi-floor apartments, and small office environments. TP-Link HomeShield provides built-in security scanning, parental controls with content category filtering and scheduling, and network traffic analysis accessible through the Deco mobile app. The cylindrical white nodes are compact enough to sit on a bookshelf, entertainment unit, or desktop without visual intrusion, and the absence of external antennas keeps the aesthetic clean and unobtrusive. Setup through the Deco app is typically completed in under 10 minutes with zero technical networking knowledge required. The XE75 is the WiFi 6E upgrade path for buyers who want modern coverage technology at a sensible price.

fields.name: ASUS RT-AX88U Pro WiFi 6 Router

characteristics.Features: OFDMA, MU-MIMO 4x4, Link Aggregation, AiMesh 2.0 compatible

fields.description: The ASUS RT-AX88U Pro is a high-performance dual-band WiFi 6 router that serves as the backbone of ASUS's networking ecosystem, offering an exceptional combination of throughput, port density, and networking features that appeals to enthusiasts and home network administrators looking for serious capability without transitioning to full enterprise-grade equipment. The AX6000 dual-band configuration delivers up to 4,804 Mbps on the 5GHz band alone вЂ” enough bandwidth to satisfy even the most demanding multi-device households with 8K streaming, gaming, video conferencing, and cloud backups running simultaneously. The port configuration is a highlight of the RT-AX88U Pro: six Gigabit LAN ports provide wired connectivity for more devices than most competing routers without requiring a separate switch, while the 2.5G WAN and 2.5G LAN ports support both multi-gigabit internet connections and high-speed wired NAS or PC connections without bandwidth constraints. Link Aggregation allows two LAN ports to be bonded for a single 2Gbps wired connection to a compatible NAS or gaming PC, enabling faster-than-Gigabit wired throughput without dedicated 2.5G NICs on client devices. AiMesh 2.0 compatibility allows the RT-AX88U Pro to serve as the primary node in an ASUS mesh network with compatible secondary nodes added anywhere additional coverage is needed. AiProtection Pro, powered by Trend Micro, provides robust network-level security scanning and parental controls. Two USB ports enable shared network storage and printer access. This is a router for users who take their home network seriously.

fields.name: TP-Link Archer C80 AC1900 Router
fields.description: The TP-Link Archer C80 is the ideal router for users who need reliable, capable wireless performance without the complexity or cost of premium WiFi 6 and WiFi 6E systems вЂ” a clean, straightforward device that handles the networking needs of a typical two- to three-person household with competence and efficiency. The AC1900 WiFi 5 specification provides 1,300 Mbps on the 5GHz band and 600 Mbps on the 2.4GHz band вЂ” throughput that exceeds the real-world requirements of streaming 4K video, gaming online, and video conferencing simultaneously for most internet service plans available today. Explicit Beamforming technology focuses the router's transmission energy toward connected devices rather than broadcasting equally in all directions, improving effective signal strength and throughput for devices that are directly connected rather than at maximum range. Four Gigabit LAN ports provide fast wired connections for PCs, consoles, smart TVs, and NAS devices, and the Gigabit WAN port ensures the router doesn't constrain connections from ISPs offering speeds above 100 Mbps. TP-Link's Tether app provides straightforward management from a smartphone, including guest network setup, parental controls, and device management without requiring access to the router's web interface. The compact, unobtrusive white chassis fits on any router shelf or desk surface without demanding attention. For buyers upgrading from older AC750 or N300 routers, the C80 provides a meaningful real-world performance improvement at a price that makes the upgrade easy to justify.

fields.name: ASUS ZenWiFi AX6600 Mesh System
fields.description: The ASUS ZenWiFi AX6600 is a well-engineered tri-band WiFi 6 mesh system that prioritizes clean design, broad whole-home coverage, and AiProtection Pro security in a package that fits naturally into any home environment. The two-node system covers up to 5,400 square feet using a dedicated third radio for node-to-node backhaul вЂ” a design that keeps client-facing bandwidth fully intact while maintaining strong inter-node connectivity across floors and walls. Each node's 2.5G port provides a high-speed connection point for a wired gaming PC, NAS, or smart TV that benefits from faster-than-Gigabit connectivity, making the ZenWiFi AX6600 a practical choice for homes with multiple demanding wired devices in addition to the wireless device population. ASUS's AiProtection Pro security suite, built in partnership with Trend Micro, provides real-time threat detection, malware site blocking, and detailed traffic analysis across every device on the network without requiring any per-device installation вЂ” protection is applied at the router level for every connected client simultaneously. The cylindrical white form factor is deliberately understated, designed to sit on a bookshelf or mantle without the aggressive visual presence of traditional gaming routers. ASUS AI Mesh 2.0 allows additional compatible ASUS routers to be added as extension nodes, enabling seamless whole-home coverage expansion as needed. The ASUS Router App provides comprehensive management from iOS and Android. For the household that wants serious coverage and security in a design-conscious package, the ZenWiFi AX6600 is an excellent choice.

fields.name: TP-Link Archer AXE75 WiFi 6E Router
fields.description: The TP-Link Archer AXE75 democratizes WiFi 6E access, making the 6GHz band available at a price point that positions it as an upgrade from premium WiFi 6 routers rather than an exotic luxury purchase. The 6GHz band is the defining feature of WiFi 6E вЂ” a spectrum range that is newly unlocked for consumer WiFi use in most regions, is currently uncrowded relative to the congested 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands, and supports the widest 160MHz channels that the standard allows, providing the cleanest, fastest wireless experience for compatible client devices. For homeowners in dense urban environments where the 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands are saturated with signals from neighboring routers, the 6GHz band of the AXE75 provides a genuinely interference-free escape for the devices that need the highest performance and lowest latency. Gaming consoles, laptops, and smartphones with WiFi 6E capability connect to a 2,402 Mbps 6GHz network that behaves as if the neighborhood's worth of competing WiFi signals simply do not exist. The concurrent 5GHz band handles WiFi 6 devices at 2,402 Mbps, and the 2.4GHz band serves legacy IoT and smart home devices at 574 Mbps, creating an intelligently segmented three-band architecture that dedicates the most capable spectrum to the most capable devices. TP-Link HomeShield provides security scanning and parental controls. The AXE75 is the future-proofing upgrade for households ready to adopt WiFi 6E without paying flagship pricing.

fields.name: ASUS ROG Rapture GT6 WiFi 6 Mesh Gaming System

characteristics.Gaming: ROG Game Boost, Port Forwarding, QoS, VPN Fusion

fields.description: The ASUS ROG Rapture GT6 is the world's first gaming-optimized mesh WiFi 6 system вЂ” a two-node AX10000 tri-band mesh that combines ROG's gaming-focused networking intelligence with whole-home mesh coverage in a visually striking package that announces its gaming credentials through angular black node enclosures that pulse with subtle ARGB lighting. The ROG Game Boost feature automatically identifies and prioritizes gaming traffic from consoles, PCs, and mobile devices, reducing latency for game packets while ensuring streaming and browsing traffic doesn't starve gaming connections of their priority allocation. Each node provides up to 5,800 square feet of combined coverage, with a dedicated 5GHz backhaul band ensuring that client-facing bands always operate at their full theoretical throughput regardless of node distance. Two 2.5G LAN ports on each node allow high-speed wired connections to gaming PCs or smart switches that extend coverage further, and the 2.5G ports support Link Aggregation with a compatible switch for even higher wired backbone throughput. VPN Fusion enables the sophisticated feature of running a VPN connection for privacy-sensitive devices simultaneously with an unencrypted direct connection for gaming devices вЂ” a configuration that competitors require manual routing table manipulation to achieve. AiProtection Pro provides comprehensive network security against both internal and external threats. The ROG Router App provides real-time network monitoring, device prioritization, and adaptive QoS control that puts gaming performance firmly under the user's command. For homes that take both their gaming network and their network security seriously, the GT6 is uniquely positioned.

fields.name: Epson EcoTank ET-2800 Wireless Inkjet

characteristics.Print Technology: EcoTank supersized ink tanks вЂ” no cartridges
characteristics.Ink Included: Enough for approximately 90 bottles of ink equivalent

fields.description: The Epson EcoTank ET-2800 fundamentally reimagines the cost model of home inkjet printing by eliminating ink cartridges entirely in favor of large, transparent refillable ink tanks that are filled from mess-free bottle drip spouts вЂ” a design that reduces the cost per page to a fraction of cartridge-based printers while also eliminating the frustrating experience of cartridges running dry at the least convenient possible moment. The included ink supply in the box provides enough ink for approximately 4,500 black pages and 7,500 color pages вЂ” equivalent to what would cost hundreds of dollars in replacement cartridges on a conventional inkjet, representing extraordinary upfront value for any household or home office with moderate to high print volumes. The 5760 x 1440 dpi print resolution delivers sharply detailed text documents and vibrantly accurate photo prints on compatible media, making the ET-2800 a genuinely versatile all-in-one that handles both document printing and photo output with quality that exceeds most home printers in this price category. The copy function supports both monochrome and color copying at up to A4 size, and the flatbed scanner digitizes documents and photos with enough resolution for archiving and sharing purposes. WiFi connectivity allows the printer to be shared across all household devices вЂ” Windows, macOS, iOS, Android, and Chromebook clients can all print wirelessly using Epson's free software and drivers. For any household tired of paying cartridge prices, the EcoTank ET-2800 repays its upfront premium many times over in savings across its long service life.

fields.name: Epson EcoTank ET-4850 All-in-One

characteristics.Connectivity: WiFi, WiFi Direct, Ethernet, USB, Bluetooth
characteristics.Ink Included: Up to 2 years of ink included in box

fields.description: The Epson EcoTank ET-4850 is the full-featured home office flagship of the EcoTank lineup, adding Ethernet networking, an automatic document feeder, fax capability, and a larger paper cassette to the cartridge-free EcoTank refillable ink system that has already saved millions of printer users from the frustrating and expensive cartridge replacement cycle. The 250-sheet front paper cassette handles a full ream of standard office paper, reducing the need for constant refilling during heavy print sessions, and the 35-sheet ADF allows multi-page documents to be copied, scanned, and faxed without manually feeding each page вЂ” a practical necessity for any home office user processing invoices, contracts, reports, or correspondence regularly. Bluetooth connectivity adds the ability to print from mobile devices even without a WiFi connection, covering printing scenarios in portable or remote setup situations. Ethernet enables the printer to be connected to a wired network for stable, always-available sharing in environments where WiFi connectivity is unreliable or where a dedicated wired connection is preferred for reliability. The included ink supply covers approximately two years of typical home office printing volume without a single cartridge purchase вЂ” a claim that no conventional inkjet printer can make. The 4800 x 1200 dpi print resolution is sufficient for professional document printing and good-quality photo output. Voice assistant compatibility with Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant enables hands-free print job commands. The ET-4850 is the EcoTank for the buyer who needs full home office functionality without the ongoing cartridge expense.

fields.name: Epson EcoTank ET-16650 Wide-Format

characteristics.Ink Included: Up to 3 years of ink included

fields.description: The Epson EcoTank ET-16650 is a wide-format all-in-one inkjet printer engineered for the home or professional creative who needs to print large-format output вЂ” posters, panoramic photographs, architectural drawings, and marketing materials вЂ” without the cost and inconvenience of outsourcing to a print shop or the ongoing expense of cartridge-based wide-format systems. The 13-inch maximum print width accommodates A3+ and Super B paper formats, enabling output sizes that standard A4/Letter printers cannot produce, from full-bleed 13x19 inch photographs to landscape document presentations that make a stronger visual impact in meetings and exhibitions. The 6-color individual ink tank system adds Photo Black, Cyan, Magenta, Yellow, and separate Light Cyan and Light Magenta tanks to the standard four-color configuration, providing smoother tonal gradients in photographic output and more nuanced color reproduction in artistic prints compared to what four-color printers can achieve. The 4800 x 2400 dpi print resolution extracts extraordinary detail from high-resolution source images, making the ET-16650 a credible home photo lab replacement for photographers who have previously relied on commercial print services for large output. The 500-sheet main cassette accommodates full reams of paper without requiring constant attention during longer production runs. The included three-year equivalent ink supply makes the upfront investment highly rational for any user with regular A3+ printing needs. The ET-16650 is the professional creative's home printing solution.

fields.name: Canon PIXMA G620 MegaTank Photo Printer
fields.description: The Canon PIXMA G620 MegaTank is designed specifically for the photo printing enthusiast who wants to produce high-quality color photographs at home without paying the extreme per-print cost of cartridge-based photo printers. Canon's MegaTank refillable system holds large volumes of GI ink across six color channels вЂ” including both dye-based inks for vivid photographic color and a pigment-based black for sharp text documents вЂ” making the G620 a genuinely dual-purpose printer that excels at both photo lab-quality picture printing and everyday document output. The 4800 x 1200 dpi print resolution combined with Canon's six-color ink system produces photographs with smooth tonal gradients, accurate skin tones, and vivid color saturation that rivals output from dedicated dye-sublimation photo printers at a fraction of the per-print cost. Borderless printing across the full 8.5 x 11 inch paper width enables edge-to-edge photographs and marketing materials that look as finished as commercially printed outputs. The included ink supply covers approximately 3,800 color prints before refills are required вЂ” extraordinary value for users who regularly produce large photographic print runs. Bluetooth and WiFi Direct connectivity allow printing from smartphones and tablets without requiring a router connection, enabling on-the-spot printing from cameras and phones at family events, gatherings, and creative sessions. Canon Print Studio Pro app integration provides professional-grade print control from macOS and Windows for photographers seeking maximum output quality from their image files. The G620 is the photo printer for the hobbyist who takes their prints seriously.

fields.name: Canon PIXMA TR8620a All-in-One Inkjet

characteristics.Ink System: Individual ink tanks (5-color PGBK + BK + C + M + Y)
characteristics.ADF: 20-sheet duplex ADF for two-sided document scanning

fields.description: The Canon PIXMA TR8620a is a home office all-in-one inkjet printer that covers every document and photo printing need a household can have in a compact, elegantly designed unit that fits on any desk without demanding excessive space or generating excessive noise. The five-color individual ink tank system вЂ” separating Photo Black from standard Black alongside standard C/M/Y color inks вЂ” provides both the sharp document text that a pigment-based black delivers and the accurate photo color reproduction that individual ink replacement per color makes economical and practical. At 15 images per minute for black documents and 10 for color, the TR8620a keeps pace with moderate home office document production without the bottleneck delays that slower consumer inkjets create during multi-page print jobs. The 20-sheet duplex ADF is particularly valuable for users who regularly digitize multi-page documents, contracts, and reports вЂ” automatic feeding and two-sided scanning eliminate the tedium of manual single-sheet flatbed scanning that is still required on lesser all-in-ones. Fax capability via the standard telephone line covers users who still interact with government agencies, legal offices, or healthcare providers that require fax documentation. The 4.3-inch color touchscreen provides intuitive direct-to-printer command input without requiring a computer for common tasks like copying, scanning to USB, and adjusting print settings. Ethernet connectivity enables stable wired network sharing alongside the WiFi and Bluetooth wireless options. PictBridge allows direct camera-to-printer photo printing without computer involvement. The TR8620a is the comprehensive home office printer solution.

fields.name: Canon PIXMA TS9520a Wide-Format
fields.description: The Canon PIXMA TS9520a is Canon's consumer-facing wide-format all-in-one, enabling borderless printing across 11x17 inch tabloid paper and A3+ formats for users who need to produce large-scale photographs, marketing materials, and presentation visuals at home without the expense and logistics of commercial printing services. Canon's 6-color Chromalife100 ink system produces vivid, photographic quality color output with excellent long-term fade resistance вЂ” Chromalife100 prints are rated to last up to 100 years when displayed under glass in indoor conditions, making this printer a credible choice for archival photo printing alongside everyday document use. The three paper feeding paths вЂ” front cassette plus dual rear trays вЂ” allow different paper types to remain loaded simultaneously, enabling users to switch between standard copy paper, premium photo paper, and specialty media without manually swapping loaded paper between print jobs. The flatbed scanner's 1200 x 2400 dpi optical resolution handles A3 scanning at quality levels appropriate for digitizing large artwork, hand-drawn illustrations, and multi-page spreads of physical books and magazines. WiFi Direct enables mobile devices to print directly to the TS9520a without being connected to the same WiFi network, useful for guest printing scenarios. Canon Print app support across iOS and Android provides straightforward wireless printing from smartphones and tablets. The TS9520a is the wide-format creative's home companion.

fields.name: HP LaserJet Pro M404n Monochrome
fields.description: The HP LaserJet Pro M404n is a business-class monochrome laser printer built for small offices and home offices where document throughput, low running costs, and consistent output quality across thousands of pages are more important than color printing capability. At 40 pages per minute, the M404n sustains document print speeds that dramatically outpace any inkjet printer in its price category, making it the rational choice for environments where waiting is genuinely not an option and where the print queue needs to keep pace with a busy workday's document demands. The 80,000-page monthly duty cycle makes the M404n a printer that can handle every conceivable document volume that a small business might generate without approaching its operational limits вЂ” a specification that provides confidence in hardware longevity far beyond typical consumer printer designs. Automatic two-sided printing is a standard feature rather than an optional add-on, reducing paper consumption by up to 50% across the M404n's working life вЂ” a meaningful saving for organizations with high document volume. HP's toner cartridges are available in both standard and high-yield configurations, with the high-yield version providing up to 9,000 pages per cartridge and delivering a cost-per-page that easily beats any inkjet alternative for monochrome document output. Ethernet network connectivity allows multiple office PCs to share the printer without requiring a USB hub or dedicated print server. The M404n is the straightforward, reliable laser printer that never lets a business down.

fields.name: HP LaserJet Pro MFP M428fdw
fields.description: The HP LaserJet Pro MFP M428fdw is a comprehensive monochrome all-in-one laser solution for small businesses and home offices that need to print, copy, scan, and fax with the reliability and throughput of a laser engine rather than accepting the lower speeds and higher cost-per-page of equivalent inkjet all-in-ones. At 38 pages per minute and with a 50-sheet duplex ADF, the M428fdw processes multi-page document workflows вЂ” scanning contracts, copying reports, faxing signed agreements вЂ” with a speed and automation level that meaningfully reduces administrative time compared to managing each page manually. The duplex ADF scans both sides of each document in a single pass, halving the time required to digitize two-sided originals compared to single-pass ADF implementations that require documents to be turned over manually. WiFi and WiFi Direct connectivity allow the M428fdw to serve wireless devices throughout the office without a wired cable run to each workstation, while Ethernet provides stable connectivity for workstations that benefit from a dedicated wired printer connection. HP Smart app support enables printing and scanning from iOS and Android devices, including remote print job submission from outside the office network for users with HP Smart subscription features active. HP's JetIntelligence toner cartridges provide encrypted authentication to prevent the use of counterfeit supplies that could degrade print quality or damage the printer mechanism. The 2.7-inch color touchscreen provides intuitive direct-printer control over all four functions without requiring a connected computer. The M428fdw is the professional choice for businesses that process large volumes of monochrome documents daily.

fields.name: HP Color LaserJet Pro MFP M283fdw

characteristics.Connectivity: WiFi, Ethernet, USB, WiFi Direct, Bluetooth LE

fields.description: The HP Color LaserJet Pro MFP M283fdw brings color laser printing вЂ” previously the exclusive domain of expensive large-format office copiers вЂ” to the small business and serious home office market at a price point that makes the upgrade from monochrome laser or color inkjet genuinely compelling. Color laser printing produces dramatically sharper, more vibrant document output than color inkjet alternatives when printing presentations, charts, graphs, marketing materials, and branded correspondence, because laser toner fuses directly to the paper fiber rather than sitting on top of it as liquid ink does, resulting in smudge-proof, water-resistant documents that maintain their quality indefinitely without fading or running. At 22 pages per minute for both color and black-and-white output, the M283fdw processes mixed print jobs at speeds that comfortably support a small team's document workload throughout a full business day. The 35-sheet ADF handles multi-page document copying and scanning without manual intervention, supporting efficient digitization of paper-based workflows. Bluetooth Low Energy enables close-proximity printing from mobile devices in environments where WiFi connectivity is unavailable or inconvenient. HP's Dynamic Security feature ensures only genuine HP toner cartridges are used, protecting print quality and the printer mechanism from potential damage from third-party toner formulations. The 2.7-inch touchscreen provides direct control over all four function modes. WiFi Direct enables printing from smartphones and tablets without router connectivity. The M283fdw is the professional color document solution for demanding small businesses.

fields.name: Epson EcoTank ET-5850 All-in-One

characteristics.Ink System: EcoTank refillable tanks (5-color, ink included for 2 years)
characteristics.Connectivity: WiFi, Ethernet, USB, WiFi Direct, NFC

fields.description: The Epson EcoTank ET-5850 is the pinnacle of the EcoTank all-in-one lineup, combining the cartridge-free, low-cost printing that makes EcoTank printers so compelling with a feature set that rivals standalone business-class laser multifunction devices вЂ” delivering the versatility and high output quality of an inkjet at volume costs previously unavailable in this segment. At 25 pages per minute for black and 12 for color, the ET-5850 prints fast enough to support a small team's document workload without the bottleneck delays that slower inkjets create during production runs. The 500-sheet main paper cassette means a full ream of standard office paper can be loaded at once, eliminating the need for the constant paper replenishment that 250-sheet printers require during active office use. The included five-color ink supply is rated for approximately two years of typical office printing вЂ” no cartridges to buy, no cartridge price anxiety during large print jobs, and no half-empty cartridges wasting unused ink when discontinued. NFC printing enables Android users to print by tapping their phone directly to the printer's NFC sensor, a convenient feature for quick mobile print tasks. The 35-sheet duplex ADF processes two-sided multi-page originals for copying and scanning without manual intervention. The 4.3-inch color touchscreen provides a tablet-like interface for navigating all four functions directly on the printer. For any small office ready to permanently eliminate cartridge replacement costs, the ET-5850 pays for itself within the first year of typical use.

fields.name: Epson WorkForce ES-500W II Document Scanner

characteristics.Output Formats: PDF (searchable), JPEG, TIFF, Word, Excel, more
characteristics.Features: Automatic separation, blank page removal, skew correction

fields.description: The Epson WorkForce ES-500W II is a professional document scanner built for home offices and small businesses that need to systematically digitize paper archives, inbound document flows, and mixed-content originals at a speed and quality level that flatbed scanners cannot match for high-volume applications. At 35 pages per minute in single-sided mode and 70 images per minute in duplex mode, the ES-500W II processes a 50-sheet document stack faster than most comparable scanners on the market, and the 50-sheet ADF capacity means a substantial stack of originals can be loaded and scanned unattended вЂ” the scanner handles the feeding, page detection, and image capture automatically while you continue other tasks. Epson's Document Capture Pro software intelligently processes scanned documents with automatic blank page removal, skew correction for pages fed at a slight angle, automatic color detection to scan in black and white where appropriate and color where needed, and multi-page PDF assembly вЂ” producing organized, clean digital document files without requiring manual post-processing. Searchable PDF output using embedded OCR makes every scanned document text-searchable within your operating system and PDF reader applications, transforming paper archives into instantly retrievable digital content. WiFi and WiFi Direct connectivity enable scanning directly to shared network folders, email, and cloud services from the scanner's control panel without requiring a connected PC. The ES-500W II is the dedicated document scanner for the paperless office transition that's been too long in coming.

fields.name: HP LaserJet Pro M15w Compact Mono
fields.description: The HP LaserJet Pro M15w is the most compact monochrome laser printer HP produces вЂ” a machine specifically designed for the home user, student, or home office worker who needs laser-quality document printing in a footprint small enough to sit unobtrusively on any desk, shelf, or bookcase without occupying workspace normally needed for other tasks. Laser printing provides decisive advantages over inkjet alternatives for document use: the toner-based output never smudges, never runs when wet, never dries out during periods of inactivity, and consistently produces razor-sharp black text regardless of whether the printer last saw use yesterday or three months ago вЂ” an important practical consideration for users who print sporadically. At 19 pages per minute, the M15w processes document jobs fast enough that waiting becomes a non-issue for homework assignments, tax forms, work-from-home documents, and personal correspondence. The first page is output as quickly as 7.7 seconds from the ready state, eliminating the warm-up delay that older laser printers required. WiFi connectivity allows printing from Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android devices without USB cables, making setup and daily use genuinely convenient in any home environment. HP Smart app support provides mobile printing and printer status monitoring from any internet-connected location. HP's toner cartridges are rated for 1,000 pages standard or up to 3,000 pages with the high-yield option вЂ” the high-yield cartridge delivers an exceptional cost-per-page for a desktop laser printer in this size and price class. The M15w is the laser printer for every home.

fields.name: Canon PIXMA MX922 Wireless All-in-One

characteristics.Connectivity: WiFi, Ethernet, USB, WiFi Direct, AirPrint, Google Cloud Print

fields.description: The Canon PIXMA MX922 is an established, well-regarded all-in-one inkjet solution for home offices that need the full complement of print, copy, scan, and fax functions in a compact, reliable unit. The 9600 x 2400 dpi maximum print resolution is among the highest in the consumer inkjet category, producing extraordinarily detailed color photographs and graphics output that resolves fine detail at a level that most printers in this price range cannot match. The five-color individual ink tank system ensures that each color channel is replaced independently, meaning that a cartridge that runs low in one color does not force replacement of still-full inks in other channels вЂ” a practical cost saving that adds up significantly over the printer's service life. The 250-sheet main paper cassette reduces paper loading frequency during moderately heavy print sessions, and the separate rear tray accommodates specialty media like photo paper, envelopes, and card stock without requiring removal of the standard paper load from the front cassette. Ethernet network connectivity allows stable wired sharing across multiple computers in a home office, while WiFi and WiFi Direct extend access to mobile devices. AirPrint support enables native iOS and macOS printing without drivers or additional applications. The 35-sheet ADF processes multi-page documents for scanning and copying without manual page-by-page feeding. Automatic two-sided printing saves paper on longer documents. The MX922 is the reliable, feature-complete home office all-in-one for buyers who don't want to compromise on any function.
